login.subtitle: Please enter your details to sign in

logout.confirm_desc: You will be returned to the login screen and need to sign in again.

dashboard.description: Access your university resources, enrolled courses, and departments.

university.title: University
university.select_subject: Select a subject to view resources

courses.title: Courses
courses.no_enrolled: You haven't enrolled in any course yet

careers.title: Career Paths
careers.subtitle: Your roadmap from zero to hero in the job market

foundation.name: CS Foundation
foundation.desc: The right start for any CS student, without this you are an incomplete coder.
foundation.why: Because it teaches you how computers think, not just how to code.

frontend.name: Frontend Development
frontend.desc: The UI engineer, responsible for everything the user sees.
frontend.why: If you love seeing your code's result instantly and enjoy design and interaction.

backend.name: Backend Development
backend.desc: The brain behind the scenes, responsible for data and systems.
backend.why: If you love logic, dealing with databases, and building complex systems.

fullstack.name: Full Stack Developer
fullstack.desc: The beast who can build the entire website from scratch (Front & Back).
fullstack.why: If you want to understand every detail of the project and increase your freelance opportunities.

mobile.name: Mobile App Development
mobile.desc: Building apps for Android and iOS using one codebase (Flutter/React Native) or Native.
mobile.why: If you want to create apps, see them on your phone, and control hardware like Camera and GPS.

data-analysis.name: Data Analysis
data-analysis.desc: Extracting treasures and insights from numbers to help companies make decisions.
data-analysis.why: If you are into statistics and love drawing smart conclusions from complex data.

ai.name: AI & Machine Learning
ai.desc: Teaching machines how to think, predict, and perform smart tasks like humans.
ai.why: If you want to be part of the future and build systems like ChatGPT or self-driving cars.

cyber.name: Cyber Security
cyber.desc: Protecting systems and discovering vulnerabilities (Ethical Hacking).
cyber.why: If you love challenges, solving puzzles, and protecting data from breaches.

departments.title: College Departments
departments.subtitle: Your comprehensive guide to understanding CS majors and choosing the best fit

cs.name: Computer Science (CS)
cs.desc: Focuses on software engineering and algorithms.
cs.suitable: For those who love coding and high-level logic.

is.name: Information Systems (IS)
is.desc: A mix of programming and business management.
is.suitable: If you like management and business logic.

it.name: Information Technology (IT)
it.desc: Focuses on networking, servers, and infrastructure.
it.suitable: If you're into hardware and networking.

cyber.name: Cyber Security
cyber.desc: Protecting systems and data from attacks.
cyber.suitable: For security enthusiasts and problem solvers.

admin.users_desc: Manage all registered students in the platform.
